/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/poc003.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o poc003  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gstreamer/1.26.8/lib -lgstreamer-1.0 -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gstreamer/1.26.8/lib -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/glib/2.86.3/lib -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -L/opt/homebrew/opt/gettext/lib -lintl -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gstreamer/1.26.8/lib -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gstreamer/1.26.8/lib -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/glib/2.86.3/lib -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -L/opt/homebrew/opt/gettext/lib -lintl -lgstbase-1.0
